content.shortSummary: Patient with subtherapeutic infliximab level, positive anti-drug antibodies, elevated CRP and suspected loss of response. Case requires reference PK/PD review.
content.clinicalQuestion: Should this Infliximab case be escalated or reviewed by the reference PK/PD team?

content.clinicalQuestion: Should this Vancomycin case be escalated or reviewed by the reference PK/PD team?
